name: chatgpt
description: Open ChatGPT in the Codex in-app browser and support delegated consultations only after Codex has gathered enough bounded context for useful second-opinion reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Open or consult ChatGPT from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A local plugin that gives Codex an @chatgpt workflow: open chatgpt.com in the Codex Browser, or when the user clearly asks to involve ChatGPT, first gather enough repo, app, runtime, or conversation evidence, then send a rich bounded context packet, wait for long-running Pro or extended reasoning responses to finish, read the final answer, and bring the useful guidance back while Codex handles tool-based verification and implementation.
defaultPrompt: @chatgpt investiga el contexto y consultalo con ChatGPT
@chatgpt pasale el contexto completo y espera que termine
